children.text: Today we lost against Gloucester A. The score (7-0) did not reflect on how we played. After the match we went swimming in the hotel pool. It was great fun when we played Water Rugby. We then had Lunch a choice of a Jumbo sausage or Spag Bol. After lunch we were invited to play the Jersey U10 development squad and for the first time on this tour we kept a clean sheet and won 3-0.
We then went to Green Bay and there was some amazing rocks to climb especially for Pavel (Spiderman). We then headed back for dinner, it was delicious. After dinner we headed back for an early night.

seo.description: Today we lost against Gloucester A. The score (7-0) did not reflect on how we played.
